action: Merge the sibling openapi-fragment.yaml: its `paths` block (12 path keys, 14 operations) into `paths`, and its `components.schemas` block (7 Equipment3r* schemas) into `components.schemas`. All referenced shared components (Uuid schema; Unauthorized/Forbidden/ValidationError responses; bearerAuth) already exist in openapi.yaml.
tag_rule: EVERY operation carries tags: [equipment-3r]. A missing per-domain tag regresses the Kotlin client into one monolithic DefaultApi.kt that OOMs kotlinc (PR #261 precedent).
after_merge: Regenerate and commit clients/{ts,kotlin,swift}; the three API-drift CI gates (openapi_drift Rust test + check:api-drift:portable + check:api-drift:swift) must all pass.
